arts.ttl: Gary Lineker and Alan Shearer slam Man Utd decision affecting fans – ‘They've suffered enough'
arts.sum: Gary Lineker and Alan Shearer have criticised Manchester United's recent decision to increase matchday ticket prices at Old Trafford and have spoken about Ruben Amorim's squad

arts.ttl: Manchester United youngster wants more than €4.5m after tax to leave – Red Devils being flexible on fee
arts.sum: Over the past couple of days, talk around Alejandro Garnacho’s future at Manchester United has calmed down considerably. However, speculation has now grown in Italy again. Chelsea were mentioned as a keen candidate to land the Argentine but now Napoli are back in the race for the player. arts.ttl: Ajax can repay Man Utd for Ten Hag and Antony with THIS transfer
arts.sum: Ajax can repay Man Utd for Ten Hag and Antony with THIS transfer Now the Johan Cruyff Arena club may just start to repay the favour, though, by completing a move that could unlock another problem player for Amorim: Marcus Rashford .

arts.ttl: Chelsea ramp up pursuit of €95m-rated Manchester United winger Alejandro Garnacho
arts.sum: Chelsea FC are set to ramp up their pursuit of Manchester United winger Alejandro Garnacho (20), according to L’Equipe. The Blues have been monitoring the 20-year-old Manchester United Academy graduate…

arts.sum: Manchester United travel to Romania to take on FCSB in their final fixture of the Europa League’s league phase. Ruben Amorim’s team remain unbeaten in Europe this season and will confirm their passage to the Round of 16 with a win this evening. arts.ttl: 'Trying to force him out' – Gary Neville makes Man Utd claim about Marcus Rashford
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford's time at Manchester United is still uncertain, but Gary Neville is convinced that Ruben Amorim is trying to push the forward out of the club

arts.ttl: FCSB vs Manchester United – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Manchester United travel to Romania to face FCSB for their final Europa League league phase game. A point for the Red Devils tonight should be enough to see them automatically progress into the knockout stages of the competition. arts.ttl: Roy Keane destroys Marcus Rashford with brutal comment on Man Utd exile
arts.sum: Former Manchester United captain Roy Keane has pulled no punches with his latest assessment of Marcus Rashford's situation at Old Trafford, with the exiled striker still no closer to an exit before the transfer deadline

arts.ttl: 'How dare they' - Alan Shearer enraged at Man United chiefs and makes Ruben Amorim claim
arts.sum: Alan Shearer and Gary Lineker have delivered a damning verdict on Manchester United's decision to raise matchday ticket prices at Old Trafford

arts.ttl: Barcelona in talks over Ansu Fati exit ahead of potential Marcus Rashford bid
arts.sum: Barcelona are in talks over loaning Ansu Fati to Ajax, which would free them up to bid for Man Utd's Marcus Rashford.
